---
title: "Portfolio in R"
---

<br>

__Some examples of my R plots, maps and results ... still under construction:__ 
<br>
<p align="center"><iframe width="1920" height="1080" src="videos/R_Shiny_Map_Reactive.mp4" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></p>

In this video, I show how it is possible to integrate __large databases__ into an __R Shiny application__ that allows you to filter and generate reactive views while maintaining the interaction of visual elements. These __apps__ are ideal alternatives for large volumes of spatial data, which are difficult to handle visually when inspecting them.

<br>

<p align="center"><iframe width="1920" height="1080" src="videos/concurso_nacional_de_visualización_de_datos_2024.mp4" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></p>

This video is a participation for the "Concurso Nacional de Visualización de Datos 2024: Contar con Datos" (National Data Visualization Competition 2024). The video presents a __data-driven story or analysis__ focused on the principles and practice of effective data filtering & visualization.<br>
To complement the video and explore the underlying data and visualizations in greater depth, you can see in this link the __interactive dashboard__ (https://hermeneuta.quarto.pub/contar-con-datos-2024-/#).

<br>

<img src="images/figura_final_2.png" style="width:100%">

Example of a map I created for the paper "Contrasting genetic diversity and ecological niche modelling of the montane grass mouse *Akodon montensis* in the south of the Atlantic Forest" from Labaroni et al. 2025. This was the third paper I had collaborated on in 2025 without receiving proper acknowledgement for doing so.

<br>

<p align="center"><iframe width="373" height="210" src="videos/Incendios_Ctes_fixed.mp4" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></p>

Example of a html self-contained with __rgee package__ (Google Earth Engine) for February 2022 fires of Corrientes Province (Argentina) with an interactive map. In red soil fire scars and in the right layer some of the smoke columns. Several layers options, scroll in - out, etc.<br>
Click on __"full screen icon"__ to see changes in full screen.<br>

<br>

<img src="images/2AnnualAbsoluteTemperatureTrend.png" style="width:100%">

Global absolute temperature change levels in celsius degrees with __R-base__.

<br>

<img src="images/1AnnualCO2emissionTrend.png" style="width:100%">

Global Co2 emmisions with __R-base__.

<br>

<img src="images/Temp_CO2_bis.png" style="width:100%">

Global absolute temperature change levels in celsius degrees with the CO2 emmissions with __R-base__.

<br>

<img src="images/solo_MX_mean2.png" style="width:100%" style="float:left">
<img src="images/solo_MX_mean.png" style="width:100%" style="float:left">

Selection of optimal conservation areas considering an assemblage of lizards in Chile and two maps with different styles. The areas were discretized into cells to be able to quantify and fragment the possibility of selection and aimed efforts.

<br>

<img src="images/3DSPINpc1.2.3CompFitz.gif" style="width:100%">

3D PCA morpho space with morphometric variables in lizards with __FactoMineR__ and __rgl package__.

<br>

<img src="images/rich_celdas.png" style="width:150%">

Lizard richness in Patagonia. Spatial discretization in 1122 hexagonal cells for species richness considering 14985 records of individual occurrences of lizards.

<br>

<img src="images/Riqueza_lat_01.png" style="width:100%">

Latitudinal lizard richness changes in Patagonia in hexagonal cells.

<br>

<iframe name="Filter" src="https://ramfa.shinyapps.io/ramfa3_bis/" style='height: 900px; width: 100%;' frameborder="0" scrolling="yes" id="iframe">...</iframe>

Example of an app with __shiny package__ with cumulative filters and reactive interactive maps. Developed for: Argentine Network for the Monitoring Fauna Runovers (RAMFA).

<br>

<img src="images/raster_misiones.gif" style="width:100%">

NDVI changes for Misiones Province for a year with __rgee package__ (Google Earth Engine).<br>
<br>
<br>
<img src="images/NuevaEscala.png" style="width:100%">

Environmental niche model projected to 2070 ac87 scenario for an endemic and threatened species of lizard using __dismo package__.

<br>

<img src="images/spp_by_genus.png" style="width:100%">

Pie chart to summarize large amounts of data with __R-base__.

<br>
